name: io.github.hbhqq9/bde-score
description: BDE Score™ — Multi-market stock analysis API with composite scoring (US/HK/A-shares). Provides fundamental, technical, and risk metrics via a single unified endpoint. EU AI Act compliant. MCP + LangChain + OpenAI Functions integration ready.

tools.name: get_bde_score
tools.description: Get BDE Score™ composite analysis for a stock (0-100 scoring across fundamental, technical, risk dimensions). Supports US, HK, and China A-share markets.

tools.name: get_stock_fundamentals
tools.description: Get fundamental analysis metrics: P/E, P/B, ROE, revenue growth, profit margins, dividend yield, and more.

tools.name: get_technical_indicators
tools.description: Get technical analysis indicators: RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, moving averages, volume analysis, support/resistance levels.

tools.name: get_risk_assessment
tools.description: Get risk assessment: volatility, beta, drawdown analysis, VaR metrics, and risk-adjusted returns.

tools.name: compare_stocks
tools.description: Compare BDE Scores across multiple stocks in the same or different markets.

symbols.description: List of stock symbols to compare
